name_en: M12598 Monogram! Victor Wallet. This elegant Victor wallet is made of Monogram Eclipse canvas, perfect for coins, business cards, bills, and receipts. It features a snap closure with a bill pocket, five card slots for credit cards or transit cards, and a zippered coin pocket. The Victor wallet is compact and easily fits into a pocket.
name_cn:
M12598 Monogram! Victor Wallet. This elegant Victor wallet is made of Monogram Eclipse canvas, perfect for coins, business cards, bills, and receipts. It features a snap closure with a bill pocket, five card slots for credit cards or transit cards, and a zippered coin pocket. The Victor wallet is compact and easily fits into a pocket.
11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width).
